youtube_items.summary: Welcome to StarCon International, where every story is built on verified facts and trusted sources. 2024 wasn't just another hot year. It was the hottest year in modern history, with global temperatures rising about 1.46 degrees Celsius above pre-industrial levels according to NASA, and the World Meteorological Organizations, 2025 reports on 2024 climate data. But a single global number doesn't tell the full story. Every continent and nearly every nation experienced its own wave of heat, flood, drought, or storm. In this documentary, we'll travel continent by continent, presenting only evidence you can check yourself. Every statistic will appear on screen with its source so you can verify every claim. youtube_items.title: [YT] Inside the planet’s most urgent climate warning - YouTube
youtube_items.summary: Something Mementus has happened. While we have been going about our daily lives, the world turned. Climate change is no longer a distant fear. It has now become a clear and current threat. Things that used to happen in geological timesbans are now unraveling in our lifetimes. We are the pivot generation. The Forus, Normality, after us, potential chaos. It falls to us to apply the breaks that will prevent climate change becoming a runaway juggernaut that no one can stop. The future of human civilization will be what we make it. Global warning is a road map for what is happening to the planet and what we can do to stop us. analysis.problem: Увеличението на глобалните температури и честотата на екстремалните неблагоприятни явления
analysis.root_cause: Глобалното затопляне, причинено от антропогенните емисии на парникови газове
leverage_points: Глобалните политики и споразумения по снижаване на емисиите на парникови газове
Инвестиции във възобновяеми източници на енергия и енергийна ефикасност

proposed_actions.action: Нарастване на инвестициите във възобновяеми източници на енергия
proposed_actions.measurable_goal: Снижаване на емисиите на парникови газове с 50% до 2030 г.

proposed_actions.action: Въвеждане на политики за енергийна ефикасност в индустриите
proposed_actions.measurable_goal: Снижаване на енергийния разход с 20% до 2028 г.

evidence: Глобалните температури са се увеличили с 1,46 градуса Целзий над прединдустриалните нива
Честотата и интензивността на екстремалните неблагоприятни явления се увеличават
analysis.generalization: Този проблем е свързан с домейните на човека, цивилизацията и космоса, тъй като има директно влияние върху здравето, сигурността и благосъстоянието на хората, както и върху устойчивостта на планетата и цивилизацията
analysis.summary: Увеличението на глобалните температури и честотата на екстремалните неблагоприятни явления представляват критичен проблем, който трябва да бъде решен чрез глобални усилия за снижаване на емисиите на парникови газове и въвеждане на политики за енергийна ефикасност

raw_items.title: NASA Science, Cargo Launch on 34th SpaceX Resupply Mission to Station
raw_items.summary: The 34th SpaceX commercial resupply mission under contract with NASA is headed to the International Space Station with new scientific experiments after lifting off at 6:05 p.m. EDT Friday on a Falcon 9 rocket from Space Launch Complex 40 at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station in Florida. The SpaceX spacecraft, loaded with nearly 6,500 pounds […]

raw_items.title: Curiosity Shakes Loose a Pesky Rock
raw_items.summary: After NASA’s Curiosity Mars rover drilled a sample from this rock on April 25, 2026, it withdrew its robotic arm and pulled the entire rock off the surface with it. Engineers spent several days repositioning the arm and vibrating the drill to try and get the rock loose. When it finally detached on May 1, […]

raw_items.title: Hubble Sights Galaxy in Transition
raw_items.summary: This NASA Hubble Space Telescope image reveals an enigmatic galaxy with a bright center and a face that hints at spiral structure, yet it holds no obvious spiral arms. Reddish-brown clumps and filaments of dust partially obscure the galaxy’s full face, while red, blue, and orange light from distant galaxies shines through its diffuse outer […]

raw_items.title: Picturing Earth in a New Light
raw_items.summary: A recent analysis revealed where artificial light at night has intensified, as well as where it has diminished.
